title: liatris × freemaniana
intro: Liatris × freemaniana, also known as the Freeman's Blazing Star, is a hybrid plant species in the Liatris genus, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Liatris × freemaniana include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
